name: Acai Berry Powder (Freeze-Dried)
description_html:
Our açaí powder is certified organic, kosher, Non-GMO Project verified, and naturally gluten-free. Our sustainably harvested açaí­ powder is freeze-dried and retains all the vital nutrients and flavor of the fresh fruit.

From the lush Amazonian rainforests of Brazil, our açaí berries are frozen immediately after harvesting and then freeze-dried in the USA. The freeze-drying process is optimal for retaining the berry's potent nutrients. The açaí berry is loaded with antioxidants, monounsaturated and polyunsaturated fatty acids. Açaí also contains many other micronutrients including resveratrol, polyphenols, flavonoids, and minerals such as magnesium and potassium. Our açaí powder has a bold flavor and the taste can be described as a marriage between a sun-ripened blackberry and delicate dark chocolate. The creamy texture blends perfectly into shakes, smoothies, yogurts and dessert recipes.

Ingredients: Organic Freeze-Dried Açaí­ Powder (Euterpe Oleracea mart)

Allergy Info: Packaged in a facility that also processes tree nuts.

Storage Info: Refrigeration not required. Store in a cool, dark, dry place.

Whether you follow a Keto or Paleo diet, or you just want to up the nutrition of your favorite treats, almond flour is the perfect alternative to wheat flour.
Almond flour is naturally higher in protein and fiber so not only will you feel more satisfied, you’ll feel fuller longer.
Inside you’ll find only the highest quality Spanish almonds that have been gently blanched and skinned, then carefully milled into a fine flour that is perfect for all of your baking needs.

Our Unpasteurized Almonds have their fats and enzymes intact and supply vitamin E, magnesium and mono and polyunsaturated fats. Use them to make delicious almond milk, grain-free flours or eat them by the handful for a satiating snack. Our almonds are packed with possibilities!

Adaptogens are known for the ability to help our bodies "adapt" to environmental and emotional stressors. The taste of ashwagandha is quite earthy and bitter, so it tastes best alongside other brewed roots and herbs, especially in tonics with an added sweetener.

The bright blue color of organic blue spirulina comes from the extraction of the phycocyanin pigment. It's harvested, the phycocyanin is extracted, and then it's dried at low temperatures to preserve its nutritional value.

You can add organic blue spirulina to juices, smoothies, bowls, baked goods, and more! It also makes a great addition to savory recipes! The smell and flavor of organic blue spirulina are much more neutral than green spirulina, making it easy to receive some of the benefits of spirulina with less of an algae taste.

It is also a rich source of potent antioxidants, phytochemicals, amino acids, vitamins, and minerals, including iron and beta-carotene. Our Camu Camu is gently dried at low temperatures to protect its broad range of nutrients and to preserve its deliciously tangy and tart flavor. Unlike lower quality Camu Camu powders, its fibrous seed is removed giving it the highest vitamin C concentration available. Enjoy by blending it with other fruits in a smoothie or juice or simply stir it into water sweetened with a bit of palm sugar. Our Camu Camu powder is a punch of flavor and vitality!
